response.justification: The candidate lacks mandatory C++ experience on Windows in capital markets or fixed-income domains; their C++ exposure is minimal and historical (NI LabWindows), with no evidence of financial domain work, SQL Server/Oracle expertise, or Windows-centric development in recent roles.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with diverse tech experience
Demonstrated contributions to open-source and dev-ops infrastructure
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops and talks
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development on Windows for financial systems
Lacks demonstrated experience in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains
SQL experience is listed generically without SQL Server/Oracle project context
